title: astragalus depressus var. helminthocarpus
intro: Astragalus depressus var. helminthocarpus, also known as the Helminthocarpus bean or the "Devil's Shoebutton", is a variety of the Astragalus depressus plant, a type of legume native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus depressus var. helminthocarpus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tincture form, and is also used in traditional medicine to make teas and infusions.
